series_metadata.series_title: Chapter 5748 (school district income tax) certified estimates
series_metadata.series_description: Tax Commissioner certified estimates to boards of education under Chapter 5748 of the O.R.C., the certified mailing card and/or other proof of delivery, and any spreadsheets, data, programming algorithms, and/or calculations determining a certified estimate.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain until no longer of administrative value. If scanned, retain for 6 months. ; Electronic: Retain until no longer of administrative value., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
